originalAlarm.description: Memory dynamically allocated by `malloc` on line 10 is not freed after the last access at line 12, column 5.

model:
(define-fun SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto () Bool
  true)
(define-fun HAVE_ECC () Bool
  true)
reasoning: Known VBDB memory leak: eckey allocated at L10 (HAVE_ECC=T) never freed before return at L24. Same bug as PRODUCT_30 (TRUE, PC=HAVE_ECC). Leak occurs whenever HAVE_ECC=T regardless of SSL_CTX. PC adds SSL_CTX=T unnecessarily. Over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_OVER.
